description: Email domains that are a national franchise BRAND, not a single office. v1 treats the whole brand as one firm (firms.is_franchise=true) because firm is secondary metadata to broker-level queries; office-level granularity is a later firm_offices child. The flag lets the UI separate franchise brands from independent firms in any 'top firms' view so brand size does not dominate. Operator-tunable via app_settings.broker_franchise_domains.
